item.title: Original Bed & Co
item.description: Saved under Stores / Furniture / Indian from the furniture-store list. Use this entry for Indian furniture, seating, tables, storage, beds, wood, craft, and home-furnishing references. Primary location/base: UK / International (Online in India).
